message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title PB-351 UC23 – View Offers Details on System Management

actor "UI (System Admin and Manager – System Management)" as UI

rectangle "Partners and Offers Platform" {
    rectangle "Next Platform" as NP
    database "Next Database" as DB
}

note top: Abstract:\nThis use case will retrieve details of a specific Offer. This endpoint already exists on the Partners and Offers platform, but we have to add on response the new fields.

UI -> NP : 1 HTTP\nGET /offers/{offerId}

activate NP

note right of NP: Note to developers\nAdd these fields on response:\n1. . benefit\n2. . listImage\n3. . listImageVersion\n4. . partnerName\n\nAlso, change the type of:\n5. . startDate\n6. . endDate\nTo consider timestamp from now on.

note bottom of NP: For partnerName consider the field 'FANTASY_NAME' in PATNER table.

NP --> UI : 2 response

deactivate NP

@enduml
```
